title: Flywheel (Legacy)
description: An accessory rendering engine for block entities and entities.
body:
## Flywheel Legacy
This page only contains versions `< 0.6.9`.

These legacy Flywheel versions are still available so that old releases of other mods, such as Create, are still usable.

Flywheel is now intended to be bundled within the mods that need it. **You do not need to download Flywheel directly for versions `>= 0.6.9.`**

Worry not, development on Flywheel is still active! You can follow the project in the Discord linked below or on the [Github](https://github.com/Jozufozu/Flywheel).

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/841464837406195712?color=5865f2&label=Discord&style=flat)](https://discord.gg/yNTWXxpvD7)

Logo by [dani](https://danicherryjam.tumblr.com/).
